basic_details.job_title: TANUVAS Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been released through the official TANUVAS website. Candidates who meet the maximum age limit of 40 years and possess qualifications such as Graduates in Veterinary Sciences / Biotechnology / Microbiology / Applied Microbiology / Molecular Biology or related disciplines can apply for this recruitment. The offline application process is currently open, and the last date for submission of the application form is 09-06-2026. D

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Graduates in Veterinary Sciences / Biotechnology / Microbiology / Applied Microbiology / Molecular Biology or related disciplines from a recognized University or equivalent. Desirable: Knowledge on basic bacteriological culture techniques, Molecular biology techniques and Bioinformatics.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TANUVAS Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TANUVAS Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the TANUVAS Project Assistant position is 09-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be graduates in Veterinary Sciences, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Applied Microbiology, Molecular Biology, or related disciplines from a recognized university or possess equivalent qualifications.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the TANUVAS Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the TANUVAS Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 09-06-2026, and the Written Examination and Interview will be conducted on 10-06-2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Project Assistant position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
